description: Retrofit ReAgent with a first-class Hermes-style agent runtime surface across CLI, API, and web while keeping existing channel and host compatibility paths.

userStories.title: Canonicalize agent session identity
userStories.description: As an operator, I want every agent entry surface to map to a canonical session id so that runtime state is inspectable across direct, UI, WeChat, and OpenClaw.
acceptanceCriteria: Define a canonical session id format that supports direct, ui, wechat, and openclaw entry sources
Read existing `wechat:<senderId>` records from `workspace/channels/agent-runtime.json` without manual migration
Persist `sessionId`, `entrySource`, and `senderId` in the session model used by the new agent surface

userStories.title: Expose agent runtime overview API
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a single `/api/agent/runtime` endpoint so that the web console and CLI can read agent runtime summary data from one canonical source.
acceptanceCriteria: Response includes session counts by entry source, configured default route, available reasoning efforts, and audit file health
Return JSON without mutating runtime or host session state

userStories.title: Expose canonical agent session list and detail APIs
userStories.description: As an operator, I want canonical session list and detail endpoints so that all agent clients read the same runtime session shape.
acceptanceCriteria: Invalid session ids return `400` and unknown session ids return `404`

userStories.title: Expose runtime history API
userStories.description: As an operator, I want runtime conversation history through the canonical agent namespace so that I can inspect stored turns without mixing them with host history.
acceptanceCriteria: Support a `limit` query parameter on the history endpoint
Return `user`, `assistant`, and `tool` turns in stored order

userStories.title: Expose hooks audit API
userStories.description: As an operator, I want canonical hook and audit endpoints so that I can inspect why the runtime called a model, executed a tool, or blocked an action.
acceptanceCriteria: Support `limit` and `event` filters on the hooks endpoint
Each event includes `ts`, `stage`, `providerId`, `modelId`, `toolName`, and `error` or `preview` when available

userStories.title: Expose canonical profile read and update API
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a canonical profile API so that role, skills, model route, fallbacks, and reasoning can be managed from one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Invalid provider or model selections and invalid reasoning values return `400` with structured error details
Successful updates return the full updated session profile

userStories.title: Add root CLI read commands for the agent surface
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a root `reagent agent` read surface so that I can inspect runtime state without remembering scattered command families.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `reagent agent sessions`, `reagent agent session <sessionId|senderId>`, `reagent agent history <sessionId|senderId>`, `reagent agent hooks <sessionId|senderId>`, and `reagent agent profile <sessionId|senderId>`
Commands support `--json` and print canonical field names from the new agent API
CLI help marks `agent` as the primary runtime control surface

userStories.title: Add root CLI mutation commands for the agent surface
userStories.description: As an operator, I want root CLI mutation commands so that I can change session role, skills, model, fallbacks, and reasoning from the canonical agent surface.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `reagent agent role`, `reagent agent skills`, `reagent agent model`, `reagent agent fallbacks`, and `reagent agent reasoning`
Support `model clear` to reset a session to the default route
Support `fallbacks clear` to remove stored fallback routes
Mutation commands support `--json` and return the updated session profile

userStories.title: Keep channel agent compatibility wrappers working
userStories.description: As an existing ReAgent user, I want current `channels agent` flows to keep working so that scripts and habits do not break during the retrofit.
acceptanceCriteria: Refactor `/api/channels/wechat/agent*` routes to reuse the canonical agent surface service instead of duplicating business logic
Existing `reagent channels agent session|role|skills|model|fallbacks|reasoning` commands continue to work
Compatibility commands return the same core fields as the canonical `reagent agent` commands

userStories.title: Add host linkage fields to agent session detail
userStories.description: As an operator, I want runtime session detail to include explicit host linkage fields so that I can tell whether a session maps to OpenClaw host state.
acceptanceCriteria: Session detail and profile responses can include `hostSessionKey`, `accountId`, `threadId`, and `lastHostSyncAt`
When no host mapping exists, host linkage fields are `null` or omitted rather than guessed
Reading runtime session detail does not write to `workspace/channels/openclaw-sessions.json`

userStories.title: Expose canonical host session APIs under the agent namespace
userStories.description: As an operator, I want canonical host session endpoints under `/api/agent/host` so that host inspection sits beside runtime inspection without merging the two models.
acceptanceCriteria: Reuse existing host registry or live bridge behavior instead of inventing a new host session source
Responses are read-only and preserve existing `sessionKey` values

userStories.title: Add root CLI host commands under the agent surface
userStories.description: As an operator, I want host session inspection under `reagent agent host` so that the canonical agent surface also covers host-linked debugging.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `reagent agent host sessions` and `reagent agent host history <sessionKey>`
Keep top-level `reagent sessions|history|watch` working and mark them as compatibility aliases in help text
Host commands support `--json` and match canonical host API field names

userStories.title: Persist delegation records for research-only subflows
userStories.description: As an operator, I want delegation records persisted so that bounded research subflows can be inspected, resumed, or cancelled without relying on terminal output.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a delegation record model with `delegationId`, `sessionId`, `taskId`, `kind`, `status`, `artifact`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`, and `error`
New records store `allowRecursiveDelegation: false` by default

userStories.title: Expose delegation APIs
userStories.description: As an operator, I want canonical delegation APIs so that bounded search, reading, and synthesis subflows can be created and inspected from one namespace.
acceptanceCriteria: Completed delegations return an artifact or memo path instead of stdout-only output

userStories.title: Add delegation CLI commands
userStories.description: As an operator, I want delegation commands under `reagent agent` so that I can launch and inspect bounded research subflows from the canonical runtime surface.
acceptanceCriteria: Support `--task`, `--status`, and `--json` on the new delegation commands
CLI returns the created delegation id and artifact path when available

userStories.title: Add web console agent session list view
userStories.description: As an operator, I want an Agent Runtime list view in the web console so that I can scan active and recent sessions without using the CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an Agent Runtime entry in the web console navigation or home surface
Session list shows `entrySource`, `senderId`, `role`, `model`, `updatedAt`, and host-link status
Clicking a row opens the agent session detail view
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add web console profile and history panels
userStories.description: As an operator, I want agent session detail panels for profile and history so that I can inspect runtime settings and recent conversation flow in one page.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent session detail shows `role`, `skills`, `model`, `fallbacks`, `reasoning`, and toolsets
Agent session detail shows runtime history separate from host history
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add web console hooks and delegations panels
userStories.description: As an operator, I want hooks and delegation panels in session detail so that I can see why the runtime acted and what bounded subflows are doing.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent session detail shows recent hook or audit events with event type and timestamp
Blocked tool calls display the stored block reason
Agent session detail shows delegations with `kind`, `status`, and artifact path
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
